title: Problem analysis in Living Labs: What is the value of an advisory service? – the case of a vegetable growers’ cooperative in Romania
description: This practice abstract presents a Living Lab participatory approach to enhance financial and marketing advisory services for a Romanian vegetable growers’ cooperative supplying Carrefour. It demonstrates how co-creative sessions led to a novel advisory document that improved members’ fiscal transparency, confidence in tax compliance, and willingness to invest in professional advice, offering lessons for future innovation-supporting services.
